parameters-en.L Time: Adjusts the length of time before the left delay's first repeat. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.LFeedback: Controls the number of repeats for the left delay. When set to 0%, only one repeat is heard; at 100%, the delay repeats forever.
parameters-en.R Time: Adjusts the length of time before the right delay's first repeat. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.RFeedback: Controls the number of repeats for the right delay. When set to 0%, only one repeat is heard; at 100%, the delay repeats forever.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the delay repeats and the dry signal. At 0%, no repeats are heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
